modmenu.descriptionTranslation.boathud: This mod adds a racing style HUD, configurable, for riding a boat, and is designed mostly for racing boats on ice.
boathud.config.title: BoatHud Options
boathud.tooltip.extended: Enables acceleration meter and input display
boathud.tooltip.bar_type: Change the display and behavior of the speed bar:
boathud.tooltip.bar_type.packed: Water & Packed: Best for low speeds.
boathud.tooltip.bar_type.mixed: Mixed: Best for running on any kind of ice.
boathud.tooltip.bar_type.blue: Blue: Suitable mostly for blue ice racing.
boathud.tooltip.camera_control: The player automatically looks in the direction the boat is going.
boathud.tooltip.camera_aggressiveness: The speed at which the player starts completely ignoring the boat's orientation (in m/s, lower is more aggressive).
boathud.tooltip.camera_smoothing: Controls how quickly the player's orientation adjusts to changes in velocity.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_lock_north: When enabled, the minimap will always show north at the top. When disabled, it will follow the player's rotation.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_show_all_heights: When enabled, ice at all heights above and below the player will be shown. When disabled, only ice at or below the player's height will be shown.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_ice_detection_ra: The vertical range at which the minimap detects ice, centered on the player's position.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_flat_ice: When enabled, all ice paths will be shown with the same brightness, ignoring height differences.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_show_other_playe: When enabled, other players in boats will be shown on the minimap as small blue triangles.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_size: Adjusts the resolution of the minimap. Higher values provide more detail but use more resources.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_zoom: Adjusts the world area shown on the minimap. Higher values show more area, lower values show more detail.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_player_indicator: Adjusts the size of the player's own indicator on the minimap.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_other_players_in: Adjusts the size of other players' indicators on the minimap.
